---
pagetitle: "Publications · David A. Marinelarena"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
section-divs: false
listing:
  - id: publications-list
    contents: ["*/index.qmd", "*.qmd"]
    exclude:
      filename: index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, categories, description]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.section-label}
// publications
:::

```{=html}
<p class="page-lede">Peer-reviewed work and preprints.</p>
```

::: {#publications-list}
:::

::: {.empty-note}
Nothing published here yet — in the meantime, see [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xzyk_aQAAAAJ&hl=en).
:::
